name: Nextronics Engineering Corp.
summary: Nextronics Engineering Corp. provides connectors, and PICMG components and solutions for medical, aerospace, transportation, industrial, cloud/communication, and automation applications in Taiwan. The company offers high speed I/O, push pull circular, backplane signal, and combo power connectors; and embedded system connectors and components. It also provides terminal blocks, press-fit machine and tooling products, and customized-solutions, as well as Compact PCI, ATCA, and AMC and Micro TCA product solutions. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
